evidence_boundary: This catalog is a routing substrate for public finance, trading, and Web3 MCP/API/tool surfaces. It records official or high-quality sources and default safety posture, but it does not prove live availability, entitlement, API-key validity, market-data correctness, or trading performance. Live-check source docs before install or exact capability claims.
default_merge_policy: Keep stark-finance-trading as the user-facing router. Vendor tools and local finance skills remain implementation details unless the user explicitly asks to install, debug, or operate a specific vendor surface.

risk_tiers.2: Authenticated read-only data or paid entitlement checks.
risk_tiers.3: Paper, demo, simulation, backtest, or infrastructure admin preview.
risk_tiers.4: Live order, transfer, wallet signature, swap, approval, leverage, bot launch, endpoint mutation, or payment state change.

catalog.name: Dune MCP
catalog.best_for: Onchain SQL, dashboard-backed metrics, holder/transfer cohorts, protocol or token historical analysis.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Dune auth/API access; use bounded queries and table semantics checks.
catalog.merge_policy: Keep as a core onchain route behind stark-finance-trading.
catalog.safety_notes: Validate table freshness, partition filters, chain semantics, and query cost before conclusions.

catalog.name: Alchemy MCP
catalog.best_for: Wallet, token, NFT, transaction, and chain-state checks across EVM/Solana routes.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Select an Alchemy app before chain calls; protect RPC and app credentials.
catalog.merge_policy: Keep as a core chain-state route behind stark-finance-trading.
catalog.safety_notes: Read-only first; transaction simulation or mutation-like workflows require explicit boundary checks.

catalog.name: Etherscan MCP
catalog.best_for: Verified contracts, ABI/source checks, transaction/event/log explorer truth.
catalog.auth_or_setup: ETHERSCAN_API_KEY may be required; fall back to explorer/web when missing.
catalog.merge_policy: Keep as the contract/explorer truth route behind stark-finance-trading.
catalog.safety_notes: Explorer labels are evidence, not proof of economic safety.

catalog.name: Binance Skills Hub
catalog.best_for: Binance account/API workflows and Binance Web3 token intelligence helpers.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Local skill install plus Binance credentials when account routes are used.
catalog.merge_policy: Keep Binance-specific skills as helpers; user-facing entry remains stark-finance-trading.
catalog.safety_notes: Account reads are tier 2; orders, transfers, swaps, approvals, leverage, and bot actions are tier 4.

catalog.name: Bybit AI Trading Skills
catalog.best_for: Bybit market, account, and trading workflows exposed as installable AI trading skills.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Bybit API credentials, environment selection, permissions, and local skill setup.
catalog.merge_policy: Keep Bybit as a vendor execution route behind stark-finance-trading, not as a separate front door.
catalog.safety_notes: Every order, leverage change, transfer, or bot-like action is tier 4 and requires explicit confirmation, paper/demo where available, max-loss, and kill switch.

catalog.name: Kraken MCP
catalog.best_for: Kraken market data, account context, and execution-capable exchange workflows through the official MCP surface.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Kraken account/API setup, permission scoping, and paper/live boundary if supported by the route.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as a Kraken-specific CEX route only when Kraken is the right venue.
catalog.safety_notes: Market reads can be lower tier; account mutation, orders, transfers, and leverage routes are tier 4 with explicit confirmation.

catalog.name: OKX API
catalog.best_for: OKX exchange market data, account, spot, derivatives, and options workflow candidates when an official API route is needed.
catalog.auth_or_setup: OKX API key, passphrase, permission scopes, environment, and account mode.
catalog.merge_policy: Prefer a controlled adapter or official API docs over unofficial MCP wrappers.
catalog.safety_notes: Orders, transfers, margin, leverage, and options actions are tier 4; require preview, explicit confirmation, max-loss, and cancel path.

catalog.name: BingX API AI Skills
catalog.best_for: BingX exchange workflows when the user explicitly needs BingX account, market, or trading-skill coverage.
catalog.auth_or_setup: BingX API credentials, permissions, and local skill setup.
catalog.merge_policy: Keep as a vendor route behind stark-finance-trading and only load for BingX-specific asks.
catalog.safety_notes: Any order, transfer, leverage, or account mutation is tier 4 and requires explicit confirmation and venue-specific risk limits.

catalog.name: Deribit API
catalog.best_for: Crypto options, futures/perpetuals, volatility surface, and derivatives execution-prep workflows.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Deribit API credentials, environment, account permissions, and instrument contract checks.
catalog.merge_policy: Use for crypto options/volatility and derivatives only when Deribit is the venue or data source.
catalog.safety_notes: Options/futures orders and margin actions are tier 4; require greeks, liquidation/margin review, preview, and explicit confirmation.

catalog.name: Alpaca MCP
catalog.best_for: US equities, ETFs, options, crypto market data, snapshots, bars, order books, and paper/live broker routes.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Alpaca API keys and paper/live endpoint selection.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as the first paper-trading capable TradFi/crypto broker route when available.
catalog.safety_notes: Market data can be tier 1/2; order placement is tier 4 and must start paper/demo.

catalog.name: OpenBB
catalog.best_for: Open finance research terminal, multi-source datasets, notebooks, macro/equity/fundamental research.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Provider credentials depend on selected OpenBB data extensions.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as research workbench; do not make it a separate user-facing Stark skill.
catalog.safety_notes: Research output needs source timestamps and provider caveats.

catalog.name: OpenBB Docs MCP
catalog.best_for: Source context for OpenBB commands, data extensions, and integration patterns.
catalog.auth_or_setup: MCP server setup; docs only.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as documentation context, not data authority.
catalog.safety_notes: Docs MCP cannot prove live market data or entitlement.

catalog.name: QuantConnect MCP
catalog.best_for: Strategy creation, LEAN backtesting, optimization, and deployment workflow preparation.
catalog.auth_or_setup: QuantConnect account and project access.
catalog.merge_policy: Use for serious strategy research and paper-first deployment paths.
catalog.safety_notes: Backtest/paper first; live deployment is tier 4.

catalog.name: LEAN
catalog.best_for: Reproducible multi-asset strategy research and local/CI backtest infrastructure.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Local engine setup and dataset entitlement.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as backtest engine substrate, not a separate skill.
catalog.safety_notes: Live adapters require explicit deployment review.

catalog.name: Alpha Vantage MCP
catalog.best_for: Low-cost market data, technical indicators, FX, crypto, macro, and fallback checks.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Alpha Vantage API key.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as market-data fallback/cross-check.
catalog.safety_notes: Check rate limits, delays, and indicator definitions.

catalog.name: Financial Modeling Prep MCP
catalog.best_for: Fundamentals, statements, valuation, market news, and equity DD scaffolding.
catalog.auth_or_setup: FMP API key and plan limits.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as equity/fundamental evidence layer.
catalog.safety_notes: Statement and estimate fields need period and source-date checks.

catalog.name: FactSet MCP
catalog.best_for: Institutional financial data, estimates, fundamentals, portfolio and security analytics.
catalog.auth_or_setup: FactSet entitlement and license constraints.
catalog.merge_policy: Use for investor-grade TradFi work when entitlement exists.
catalog.safety_notes: Respect redistribution and licensing limits.

catalog.name: Twelve Data MCP
catalog.best_for: Global market data, indicators, FX, crypto, and WebSocket-style market feeds.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Twelve Data API key and plan limits.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as multi-asset data cross-check.
catalog.safety_notes: Mark feed delay and plan limitations.

catalog.name: Unusual Whales MCP
catalog.best_for: Options flow, dark-pool prints, congressional trading, Greeks, and volatility/flow research.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Unusual Whales API access.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as options-flow signal source behind the router.
catalog.safety_notes: Flow is not a trade recommendation; cross-check contracts and liquidity.

catalog.name: Massive / Polygon.io MCP
catalog.best_for: Institutional-style market data across stocks, options, FX, crypto, futures, news, and fundamentals.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Massive/Polygon API key and entitlement.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as high-quality market-data layer.
catalog.safety_notes: Respect plan coverage, delays, and vendor definitions.

catalog.name: Tradier MCP
catalog.best_for: Stocks/options broker quotes and order workflows, especially options routes.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Tradier account/API credentials and paper/live environment.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as execution-capable broker route only after safety policy.
catalog.safety_notes: Every order is tier 4; paper first.

catalog.name: IBKR TWS API
catalog.best_for: Multi-asset brokerage, portfolio/risk monitoring, and TWS/Gateway order workflows.
catalog.auth_or_setup: IBKR account, TWS/Gateway, paper/live mode, permissions, and local connectivity.
catalog.merge_policy: Treat community MCPs as candidates; official API remains primary source.
catalog.safety_notes: Paper/live mode, permissions, preview, max-loss, and kill switch are mandatory.

catalog.name: cTrader AI Agent Connect
catalog.best_for: FX/CFD broker workflows and AI-agent connection to cTrader accounts.
catalog.auth_or_setup: cTrader account, broker rules, demo/live selection.
catalog.merge_policy: Use for FX/CFD after broker-specific assumptions are verified.
catalog.safety_notes: Demo first; lot size, margin, leverage, and stop-out rules must be verified.

catalog.name: OANDA v20 REST API
catalog.best_for: FX/CFD account, pricing, historical candles, order preview, and broker-specific risk workflows.
catalog.auth_or_setup: OANDA account, token, practice/live environment, instruments, margin rules, and account currency.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as an official FX/CFD broker API route when OANDA-specific evidence matters.
catalog.safety_notes: Practice first; live orders, margin changes, and account actions are tier 4 with explicit confirmation and broker risk assumptions.

catalog.name: MetaTrader 5 Python Integration
catalog.best_for: MT5 terminal/account integration, FX/CFD/XAUUSD data, and broker-specific order-prep workflows.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Installed MT5 terminal, broker account, symbol/contract specs, lot size, margin, and demo/live state.
catalog.merge_policy: Use only when a local MT5/broker surface is the truth source; keep it behind safety policy.
catalog.safety_notes: Terminal trading is tier 4; require demo/live check, lot contract size, margin/stop-out, preview, and explicit confirmation.

catalog.name: TradingView Broker API
catalog.best_for: TradingView broker integration, chart/signal context, and alert-to-order boundary design.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Broker integration credentials, TradingView/Broker API setup, user session, and order routing model.
catalog.merge_policy: Use TradingView as chart/signal/broker-integration context, not as an automatic execution shortcut.
catalog.safety_notes: Alerts and chart signals are not orders; broker actions are tier 4 and require explicit order preview and confirmation.

catalog.name: Coinbase CDP / AgentKit MCP
catalog.best_for: Coinbase CDP/AgentKit wallet, agent, and payment-adjacent Web3 workflows.
catalog.auth_or_setup: CDP credentials, AgentKit setup, wallet/action permissions.
catalog.merge_policy: Keep wallet/payment actions behind stark-finance-trading safety gates.
catalog.safety_notes: Transfers, payments, signatures, swaps, and approvals are tier 4.

catalog.name: QuickNode MCP
catalog.best_for: Web3 endpoint inventory, endpoint setup, chain support, and infrastructure security rules.
catalog.auth_or_setup: QuickNode account and endpoint credentials.
catalog.merge_policy: Infrastructure/admin route only; not market signal.
catalog.safety_notes: Endpoint creation or security-rule changes require explicit confirmation; never reveal secrets.

catalog.name: CoinGecko MCP
catalog.best_for: Crypto prices, OHLCV, market cap, token metadata, NFT and DeFi data cross-checks.
catalog.auth_or_setup: CoinGecko API key/plan for higher limits.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as neutral market-data cross-check for crypto.
catalog.safety_notes: Resolve token IDs/contracts; market data is not execution advice.

catalog.name: CoinMarketCap MCP
catalog.best_for: Crypto rankings, quotes, categories, market pairs, and exchange-market cross-checks.
catalog.auth_or_setup: CoinMarketCap API key/plan.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as neutral crypto rank and quote cross-check.
catalog.safety_notes: Resolve IDs/contracts and source timestamp.

catalog.name: Token Terminal MCP
catalog.best_for: Crypto protocol fundamentals, revenue, fees, users, sectors, chain/project metrics.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Token Terminal access and metric entitlement.
catalog.merge_policy: Use for investable protocol narrative and fundamentals evidence.
catalog.safety_notes: Metrics need methodology and timestamp caveats; no direct buy/sell inference.

catalog.name: DeFiLlama API
catalog.best_for: TVL, yields, fees, stablecoins, protocol revenue, and DeFi category context.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Public API or plan-specific limits.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as DeFi aggregate cross-check.
catalog.safety_notes: Aggregate metrics have methodology gaps and are not safety labels.

catalog.name: Helius MCP
catalog.best_for: Solana account, transaction, token/NFT/DAS, webhook, streaming, and launch-flow analysis.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Helius API key and Solana network selection.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as primary Solana route when installed.
catalog.safety_notes: Reads are tier 1/2; wallet actions and webhook mutations need confirmation.

catalog.name: Jupiter APIs
catalog.best_for: Solana swap quote, liquidity routing, token, lending, and route-quality context.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Jupiter API setup depending on endpoint.
catalog.merge_policy: Use quote/routing intelligence unless wallet signing is explicitly requested.
catalog.safety_notes: Quote is not authorization; signing/swapping is tier 4.

catalog.name: DexScreener API
catalog.best_for: DEX pair discovery, market display behavior, price action, liquidity, and token-page cross-checks.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Public API limits.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as DEX market-display cross-check; community MCP wrappers are not official by default.
catalog.safety_notes: Pair data can be spoofed or stale; validate contracts and liquidity.

catalog.name: The Graph Subgraph MCP
catalog.best_for: Subgraph discovery, schema inspection, GraphQL query planning, protocol-specific indexed data, and repeatable onchain data access.
catalog.auth_or_setup: MCP setup and target subgraph/API configuration; verify subgraph freshness and schema before relying on metrics.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as a structured indexed-data route behind stark-finance-trading, especially when Dune SQL is not the right shape.
catalog.safety_notes: Subgraphs can lag or encode project-specific semantics; validate indexing freshness, schema fields, and entity definitions.

catalog.name: Goldsky MCP / AI Skills
catalog.best_for: Goldsky docs/search, subgraphs, Mirror/Turbo data pipelines, Compose, Edge RPC, and Web3 indexing build/debug workflows.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Goldsky account/API or docs MCP setup depending on workflow; pipeline deployment may require project credentials.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as a Web3 data-pipeline route, not a separate user-facing skill.
catalog.safety_notes: Docs search is low risk; pipeline deployment, database writes, or paid endpoint changes require explicit confirmation.

catalog.name: Moralis Cortex MCP
catalog.best_for: AI-native Web3 data questions across wallet activity, token flows, holder context, NFT/token metadata, EVM, and Solana surfaces.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Moralis API/Cortex access and plan limits.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as a multichain Web3 data route when a natural-language data layer is useful.
catalog.safety_notes: Treat natural-language data answers as source-labeled evidence; cross-check contract identity and chain before conclusions.

catalog.name: GoldRush MCP
catalog.best_for: Covalent/GoldRush multichain wallet balances, transactions, NFT data, token prices, and structured blockchain API access.
catalog.auth_or_setup: GoldRush API key and MCP package setup.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as a multichain indexed-data cross-check beside Alchemy, Moralis, Dune, and Etherscan.
catalog.safety_notes: Read-only data route; resolve chain, address, and token identity before using results in risk or execution workflows.

catalog.name: SQD Portal MCP
catalog.best_for: High-throughput blockchain data queries, logs, transactions, wallet analysis, chain comparison, and datasets such as Hyperliquid when available.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Portal MCP setup and network/dataset selection.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as a high-throughput chain-data route for research and indexing workflows.
catalog.safety_notes: Check dataset freshness, indexing head/lag, network support, and query scope before analysis.

catalog.name: Stripe Agent Toolkit
catalog.best_for: Payment, billing, checkout, treasury, and revenue operations.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Stripe account/API keys with scoped permissions.
catalog.merge_policy: Finance-ops route, not trading signal or market data.
catalog.safety_notes: Payment, refund, billing, and customer mutations are tier 4.

catalog.name: Plaid API
catalog.best_for: Bank/account connectivity, balances, transactions, and cashflow evidence.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Plaid app credentials and scoped user consent.
catalog.merge_policy: Financial data infrastructure route, not brokerage execution.
catalog.safety_notes: Sensitive account data requires minimal-scope handling and no unnecessary exposure.

catalog.name: Databento API
catalog.best_for: Historical/live institutional-grade market data for serious strategy research.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Databento account, dataset, venue, and cost entitlement.
catalog.merge_policy: Use for high-rigor research when data entitlement exists.
catalog.safety_notes: Check dataset, venue, latency, symbology, and cost.

catalog.name: Finnhub API
catalog.best_for: Equity market data, company news, fundamentals, earnings, sentiment, and research cross-checks.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Finnhub API key and plan limits.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as a research/news/fundamental evidence layer behind the single Stark route.
catalog.safety_notes: News and sentiment require timestamp/source checks and cannot become standalone trade advice.

catalog.name: Nasdaq Data Link API
catalog.best_for: Nasdaq Data Link datasets, macro/alternative data, and structured research inputs.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Nasdaq Data Link API key, dataset subscription, and redistribution constraints.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as a dataset route for investor-grade research, not as a broker/execution route.
catalog.safety_notes: Check dataset vintage, subscription entitlement, redistribution rules, and transformation assumptions.

catalog.name: Hummingbot
catalog.best_for: Crypto market-making, arbitrage, exchange connector configuration, and bot risk review.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Local install, exchange connectors, sandbox or tiny-capital setup.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as bot framework behind safety gates.
catalog.safety_notes: Sandbox/config review before live; live bot launch is tier 4.

catalog.name: Freqtrade
catalog.best_for: Crypto strategy research, backtesting, hyperopt, dry-run bot execution, and risk config review.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Local install and exchange/account configuration.
catalog.merge_policy: Use as crypto bot framework behind paper/dry-run first policy.
catalog.safety_notes: Dry-run first; live bot launch is tier 4.

catalog.name: NautilusTrader
catalog.best_for: Event-driven backtest/live architecture and advanced quant strategy engineering.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Local framework setup, adapters, data feeds, and broker/exchange credentials.
catalog.merge_policy: Use only when task needs advanced strategy engineering.
catalog.safety_notes: Formal strategy spec required before live adapters.

catalog.name: CCXT
catalog.best_for: Crypto exchange connector substrate for custom data and execution adapters.
catalog.auth_or_setup: Exchange API keys and per-exchange capability/rate-limit handling.
catalog.merge_policy: Low-level substrate; wrap with local safety checks before use.
catalog.safety_notes: Rate-limit, cancellation, balance desync, order-id, and precision safety required; live orders are tier 4.
